app.title: TAKE THE L33D
app.tagline: Driving business growth through quality leads
register.title: Request a quote
register.subtitle: A modern lead intake experience designed to feel credible from the first click: secure submission, clear follow-up, and confident reporting.
register.formSubtitle: Clear, private, and fast. A confirmation number appears after submitting.
register.disclaimer.title: Before you submit
register.disclaimer.body: By submitting, you confirm that your information is accurate and authorize the TAKE THE L33D team to contact you about your request and the raffle results.
register.feature.instant.title: Reliable follow-up
register.feature.instant.body: Every lead is routed for a clear, timely response within 24 hours.
register.feature.secure.title: Secure data
register.feature.secure.body: Protected intake and transparent handling help every lead feel in control.
register.feature.team.title: Human-backed support
register.feature.team.body: Requests go straight to the team responsible for high-intent lead relationships.
register.sidebar.note: Use an email you check often. Confirmation and winner notices are sent there.
register.error.generic: Could not submit the request. Try again.
confirmation.title: Request received!
confirmation.subtitle: Thanks for requesting a quote.
confirmation.subtitle.line1: Thanks for connecting with TAKE THE L33D.
confirmation.subtitle.line2: An advisor will reach out within 24 hours.
confirmation.numberNotice: Save it — you'll need it for the iPad raffle.
confirmation.notice: Save this number — you'll need it for the iPad raffle.
confirmation.email.title: Check your email
confirmation.email.body: We've sent you an email with your confirmation and next steps.
confirmation.email.spam: If you can't find it, check your spam or promotions folder.
confirmation.notice1.title: Your request reached the insurance team
confirmation.notice1.body: Our team will review your information and contact you with a personalized quote.
confirmation.notice2.title: You are already entered in the giveaway
confirmation.notice2.body: You're automatically entered to win an iPad.
confirmation.notice3.title: Confirmation sent by email
confirmation.notice3.body: We've sent your request details to your email address.
confirmation.timeout.title: We're processing your request
confirmation.timeout.body: This can take a few minutes. Check your email or reload this page in a moment.
login.title: Manager sign in
login.subtitle: Enter the password to access the dashboard.
login.error.network: Could not reach the backend. Local dev falls back to demo mode if no API is configured.
login.error.config: Manager access is not configured yet.
login.error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
dashboard.title: Welcome, Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time summary of your insurance leads.
dashboard.search.placeholder: Search by name, email or number...
dashboard.exportError: Could not export the lead list.
detail.title: Lead detail
raffle.winner.title: 🎉 We have a winner!
raffle.winner.name: Name
raffle.winner.emailSent: Notification email sent to the winner
raffle.winner.emailFailed: Could not send the email to the winner
raffle.error.notFound: That number does not match any participant.
raffle.error.alreadyDrawn: That participant has already been drawn, or no participants remain.
raffle.confirm.redraw: There is already a winner. Draw another participant?
